message:
refactor(retry): pin_project migration — remove Unpin bounds from Retry future

Replace manual Pin::new() calls with pin_project derive macro on
RetryInner and Retry structs. This eliminates the F: Unpin,
Fut: Unpin, P: Unpin, Pred: Unpin, E: Unpin bounds from the
Future impl, allowing Retry to work with !Unpin futures.

RetryInner variants Polling(F) and Sleeping(Sleep) are now
structurally pinned with #[pin], and the poll() method uses
projected types (RetryInnerProj) for safe pin access. State
transitions use this.inner.set() instead of direct assignment
through &mut self.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
